summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool that runs connectivity tests, translates Goss tests, and exposes functionality via MCP handlers.
concerns: Duplicate internal/baseline directory paths suggest incomplete refactoring or merge artifact
Archived GLM agent files left in repository cluttering structure
High test count (568) with multiple _extra_test.go files may indicate scattered test organization
Staged changes during analysis imply unstable working state
suggestions: Clean up duplicate GOrchestra/glm-agents paths and archived agent artifacts
Consolidate extra test files into their primary test files for better maintainability
Commit or stash staged changes before branching or merging
Document the MCP integration and Goss migration strategy in docs/commands
